commands.review_summary:
The branch adds stable visible-time ordering to Control chat items, regression coverage, and a changelog entry, with small maintainer refresh cleanup in gateway/plugin type-check surfaces.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main appends stream/tool items after history, so an older live item can render below newer history. The PR body also gives after-fix builder output for the same mixed history/live case.
